input: user-item bipartite graph (interactions and item transitions)
output: ranked list of items per user
backbone: dual hypergraph convolutional network with gated message passing
loss: BPR loss + self-supervised learning loss (node discard contrastive)
key_idea: model high-order user-item interactions via dual hypergraphs and gated message passing, with self-supervised learning to alleviate data sparsity
